parameters.formDescription: input_mode=form_upload thi upload file/text. input_mode=drive_url thi cung cap full Google Drive URL.

assignments.name: image_prompt_fixed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.image_prompt_fixed || "Create a cinematic 8-second video scene for the script chunk." }}

parameters.batchSize: ={{ (() => { const n = Number($json.image_parallelism ?? 2); if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n < 1) return 2; return Math.min(20, Math.floor(n)); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { request_id: $json.request_id, workflow: $json.workflow || 'text-to-videos-veo3', scene_id: $json.scene_id || $json.chunk_key, order: $json.order, scene_title: $json.scene_title || '', narration_text: $json.narration_text || $json.text || '', image_prompt_en: $json.image_prompt_en || '', video_prompt_en: $json.video_prompt_en || $json.image_prompt_en || '', highlight_quote_vi: $json.highlight_quote_vi || '', prompt: $json.video_prompt_en || $json.image_prompt_en || $json.image_prompt_fixed || $json.text || '', model: $json.image_model || 'veo3', aspect_ratio: $json.image_aspect_ratio || '16:9', target_duration_seconds: Number($json.target_duration_seconds || $json.duration_seconds || $json.estimated_duration_sec || 0), duration_buffer_seconds: Number($json.duration_buffer_seconds || $json.video_target_buffer_seconds || 1), clip_duration_average_seconds: Number($json.clip_target_avg_seconds || $json.video_clip_duration_seconds || 8), shot_count_initial: Number($json.shot_count_initial || 1), shot_prompts_en: Array.isArray($json.shot_prompts_en) ? $json.shot_prompts_en : [], generation_strategy: 'generate_until_enough', concat_and_trim: true, trim_to_target_duration: true, filler_policy: 'hold_last_frame', input_mode: $json.input_mode, output_mode: $json.output_mode, drive_file_id: $json.drive_file_id || '', source: 'text-to-videos-veo3', provider: 'veo3', mock_mode: $json.video_mock_mode !== false, video_file_name: String($json.video_file_name || $json.image_file_name || ''), file_name: String($json.video_file_name || $json.image_file_name || '') } }}
